name: kanban-api
description: Manage todos, projects, and knowledge base pages via the hosted kanban API. Slash commands, skills, and an autonomous agent for productivity workflows.

api_url.title: Kanban API URL
api_url.description: Base URL of your kanban app (e.g. https://kanban-todos-production.up.railway.app)

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for authentication (starts with kb_). Create one from the API Keys tab in the web UI.
